title: Mini Loop Resistance Bands For Women, Rubber Exercise Bands Resistance For Legs And Glute, 6 cm Widened Version
features: ☞【Widened Width】 This new set of mini band knee resistance bands is an upgraded version with a widened width of 6 cm which is wider than most other brand’s products on amazon. The optimized size can help to reduce pinch pain feeling on skin while stretching.

☞【Regular Length】 The perimeter of these looped resistance bands is about 23.6 inches / 60 cm, Which means that the size fit most people. But if you are very strong or stout, these leg bands for exercise may be too short for you. So please pay attention to this parameter before placing an order.

☞【High Elasticity】 These mini loop bands for exercise can stretch up to 500%, they are not easy to break nor to deform if they are not stretched more than 5 times its length at rest. This feature of the glute bands for women allows for a full range of motion while exercising.

☞【Premium Latex Material】 To insure soft and smooth touch feel of these small resistance bands, we make them from natural latex material. It is our pursuit to make every fitness enthusiast doing workouts with short resistance bands have a better exercise experience. On the downside, latex-material product may cause allergic reactions in a very small number of people. Also they have a rubbery smell but they are non-toxic.

☞【Progressive Resistance Level】 The thicknesses of these five exercise stretch bands for physiotherapy are different, thus they have progressive stretching resistance for a variety of exercises and fitness levels. you can use these rehab bands resistance separately in the progressive resistance training. And you will be glad to see improvements in your fitness journey.

☞【Versatile】 These resistant bands excercise bands are versatile and can be used for a full-body workouts like lateral band walks, squats, hip bridges, standing hip abductions, triceps extensions to help increase mobility in the legs, hips, glutes, shoulders, calves and thighs. They are perfect for warming up, stretching, strength training, body building, physical therapy, rehabilitation exercises and Pilates.

☞【Instructions For Use And Storage】 To maintain the performance and longevity of latex exercise bands resistance for women, please keep them clean and dry at room temperature after every workout and avoid direct exposure to sunlight. They are washable by hand. During your workout, please pay attention to the stretching length, over stretch may rip the mini resistance bands squat bands and cause injury.
description: This pilates bands resistance set has vibrant multicolor, soft and smooth touch feel, high elasticity, and progressive resistance. It is a portable and efficient sports equipment for body-building exercises and rehabilitation wherever you are at home, in the gym or in clinic. A small carrying bag is also provided, you can even take the physio bands resistance with you when traveling. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned athlete, you can certainly make a more effective workout with these latex workout bands resistance training bands. This strength training equipment is great addition to your workout routine. Band Color: yellow, red, green, blue, black Band Size: 30*6 cm / 11.8*2.4 inches (L*W) Band Material: natural latex Band Applications: warming up, stretching, strength training, body building, physical therapy, rehabilitation exercises, yoga and Pilates. Resistance Level: extra light, light, medium, heavy, extra heavy. Package Includes: five resistance loop bands, one carrying pouch, one instruction manual Storage Condition : Please keep the rubber bands gym elastic resistance band clean and dry at room temperature. And they can be rinsed by hand after use. Caution : 1. These elastic bands gym bands resistance contain natural latex, it may cause allergic reactions in a very small number of people. 2. Over stretch （more than 500%） may rip the home fitness bands resistance for women and cause injury. Please keep a safe distance of the gym elastic bands for exercise from your face and eye while stretching. 3. These yoga resistance bands are non-toxic even though it has a rubbery smell. Please rinse them before fist-time use if you feel unpleasant with the smell.
